name: Neroli Radiance Face Wash
short: A gentle gel face wash that lifts impurities and excess oil without stripping, leaving skin balanced and softly luminous.
description: A gentle gel-to-foam face wash formulated for daily use on all skin types. Neroli and green tea extracts calm and brighten, while a mild amino-acid surfactant derived from coconut lifts impurities, makeup, and excess oil without disrupting the skin’s moisture barrier. Skin feels clean, soft, and comfortably balanced — never tight or squeaky. Subtle neroli aroma turns a daily habit into a small ritual.
benefits: pH-balanced (5.5) to protect the skin’s acid mantle
Removes makeup, SPF, and excess oil in one cleanse
Suitable for morning and evening use on all skin types
usage: Massage a pea-sized amount onto damp skin in circular motions for 30 seconds. Rinse thoroughly with lukewarm water. Use morning and evening. Follow with serum and moisturizer.
